name: build-websites-tools
description: Shared build-time gates for portfolio websites — ADA WCAG 2.1 AA enforcement + Google indexing-rules enforcement + MASTER_VISIBILITY_MATRIX §17.3.1.2 AI Instrumentation Contract enforcement. Consumed by each site (siteclinic-web, ada-audit-tool site/, daily-rise, etc.) via file:../build-websites-tools dependency. Build script once, use many.
